mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_messages (session_id, sender_type, content, send_time, is_read , sender_id) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{sendTime}, #{isRead} , #{senderId})
INSERT INTO ai_chat_sessions (session_id, user_id, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted});
mapper.select: SELECT session_id AS sessionId, user_id AS userId, title, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM ai_chat_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC;

SELECT s.session_id AS sessionId, s.title, m.content AS lastMessageContent, m.sender_type AS senderType, m.send_time AS lastUpdateTime, (SELECT is_read FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE session_id = s.session_id ORDER BY send_time DESC LIMIT 1) AS isRead FROM ai_chat_sessions s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT session_id, content, sender_type, send_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session_id ORDER BY send_time DESC) AS rn FROM ai_chat_messages ) m ON s.session_id = m.session_id AND m.rn = 1 WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.update_time DESC;
SELECT msg_id, session_id, -- 需要保留，用于映射到 chatSession.sessionId sender_id, sender_type, content, send_time, is_read FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY send_time ASC;
SELECT sender_id, sender_type, content, send_time, is_read FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY send_time ASC;
SELECT session_id AS sessionId, user_id AS userId, title, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM ai_chat_sessions WHERE session_id = #{sessionId};
